{{Infobox group
| name = Izyrian
| introduced = Of Sea and Shadow
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The Izyrian are a group of tribes characterized by their light hair and pale skin. They are distinct from the citizens of the [[Aurelian Heartlands]], and their people often serve as gladiators in large arenas. These combat venues can be massive, capable of seating tens of thousands of spectators, and some have been found constructed in subterranean chambers. The Izyrian culture is noted for having its own governance, with the people ruling themselves separately from other regions like [[Erin]] or the [[Heartland]]. Notable figures from this group include the strategist [[Yenzir]].}}

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|Gladiators are almost always descended from the light-haired [[Izyrian]] tribes.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c6">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The Izyrian people are linked to several key figures, including [[Calder Marten]] and potentially [[Shera]]. Within Clayborn's crew, a [[Soulbound]] serves as a former [[Izyrian gladiator]]. During combat, [[Shera]] faces an Izyrian man with red hair, and another individual of Izyrian descent manages to break [[Meia]]'s rock missile while it is in midair.}}

<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">5</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Shera]] might have had [[Izyrian]] ancestry.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c3">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 3</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Calder Marten]] is of [[Izyrian]] heritage.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c4">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 4</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|There is a [[Soulbound]] on Clayborn's crew who is a former [[Izyrian gladiator]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c6">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|An [[Izyrian]] redhead is one of the men [[Shera]] fights.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c14">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 14</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|An [[Izyrian]] broke [[Meia]]'s rock missile in midair.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c21">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 21</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Of Sea and Shadow]]
[[Category:Of Shadow and Sea]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire groups]]
